title: Digital media insignia
author: Priya
content:
Digital and print media are a vital source in our daily life to keep us updated with the things happening around, in widening our knowledge base in different areas of filming world, science, and research. We see a transforming change in our way of living, both physical and mental, by following up and relating ourselves with big filming stars, social media influencers, and tech geeks who work to give us a good, thrilling experience in field of science, education, and entertainment. Today, we have different streaming platforms and OTTs flooded with a wide range of content for our fun and entertainment. And when we have varied choices for our fun watch, we are in a state of dismissal with our indecision to choose what content to watch and what not. And owing to this, it has become a deciding factor for us to pick relevant content based on our needs.

Their adoring and depreciative effect

- Today we r so connected with the world through internet, and a life without it is limited to a finite space in a trance-like state with no inferences of things happening around. Now in a world of internet with plethora of open streams of learning, education and fun why life has turned so cumbersome and delusional .

* Different sources of our entertainment have made us so addicted to watching screens that we are being cynical to our real friends and colleagues by creating a courtroom drama with our indulgence in their personal lives, creating mistrust, and vague, incisive remarks to dent someone's life.

*   By listening to the warring news of violence and killings, we become very sensitive and thoughtful for our own relations and sometimes question honesty and sincerity of our own people, put them into distress and dissonance, and sometimes enter into collapse at the point of breakage for our relationship.

* Too much screen time risks our health, making us mentally weak and inactive, weakening our thinking power, adding up mental clutter for the brain with poor thoughts, obscenity, paranormal actions and thoughts, and creates distraction for us in focussing into things that r much more important for us for a considerable growth in our career and future.

* We watch films, reels only for mental relaxation from stress and exhaustion, but giving our maximum time for our fun and entertainment deviate us from our actual goal, which is our career for a better future. The time which we can utilise in doing something productive is wasted in occupying self in doing something that's a mere fun activity with no meaningful outcome at the end of it.

* What we see or listen to in broadcasting deemed as true, and this way, sometimes we become a victim of a false narrative that is portrayed to us, and we tend to believe in such false propaganda or rumours. Watching and listening to every online source and untrusted platforms could spread false information to us. Appearance can be deceiving sometimes. Hence, too much reliance on digital sources that r not censored could lead to falsifying, misleading information spreading to us.

* The content telecasted to us through digital media has no age-limiting bar set over the video, graphics, and images we see online, and it drastically spoils kids' habits, thoughts, and more to their mental health. And such digital content is breaking all norms and parameters defined within our cultural boundaries. Kids r getting very notorious, brazenly uncivilized,  and more disrespectful to their own culture by watching such content full of profanity, destroying our cultural dimensions and human values.


Looking to the shortcomings we r deeply shadowed with, will that be a crowning stroke for us to cut ourselves completely from digital/printing press, which is a source of enriching knowledge, a fun media, and for a lot of insightful news to keep us connected with the world. 

Some fun-loving, beautiful moments we get from a screencast r worth seeing -

* TV and digital media are not just for our fun and entertainment. We get to learn a lot from it. We learn how to communicate well by listening to big TV stars, some moral ethics, motivation to succeed in our career, an inspiration to do something good and productive, and a lot more from our way of living to lead a happy, contented life.

* These digital sources of social media have made us so connected to the world that by sitting at a place, we can walk through the entire world to see what's happening elsewhere. We globetrot the entire world and know how grim the situation is in and around us. A news media gives us a true reflection of things in our vicinity and a self realisation of how world is changing and evolving to look deep into the sky  , see through oceans and river, and many other incredible exploration that news and print media made us to see through.

* TV and a virtual, digital world is not only a great source for our fun and thriller but a stress reliever from our days of exhaustion and mental concussion, a therapy for stress busting, an unlimited source for our entertainment, and fun ride to sail through the glooms of our work life imbalance and sad, miserable occurrences of our day to day life.

Conclusion

- A world of media and the entertainment industry is the only source to keep us motivated, infused with knowledge and wisdom, and give a spark to our life by adding specks of fun and comedy for a thrilling, breathtaking experience. Though it has serious disturbing nuances for our health, growth, and development in work, to someone's personal self in a relationship, and certain other dehumanizing behaviour a digital media poses for us. But other foresighted, lucrative use of digital media and news outlets shouldn't be subsided. And "One good thing outweighs a hundred illnesses". Keeping that in mind effective use of social media and other digital platforms vitalizes its significance and needed-benefits we get when we feel relieved with crawling thoughts, work stress, and splitting headaches. Fun, thrilling moments we get by including some filming or graphics media, talk shows, or other comedy stuff accentuate their importance in our daily lives. Hence, their use cannot be simply cut off from our life, looking at all the fun and relishing moments of joy 1 get in its presence.
